hooks.command: node -e "let d='';process.stdin.on('data',c=>d+=c);process.stdin.on('end',()=>{try{const i=JSON.parse(d);const cmd=i.tool_input?.command||'';if(process.platform!=='win32'&&/(npm run dev\b|pnpm( run)? dev\b|yarn dev\b|bun run dev\b)/.test(cmd)&&!process.env.TMUX){console.error('[Hook] Tip: run dev server in tmux so logs persist across sessions');console.error('[Hook] tmux new -s dev | tmux attach -t dev')}}catch{}console.log(d)})"

PreToolUse.description: Remind to use tmux for dev servers (non-blocking)

hooks.command: node -e "let d='';process.stdin.on('data',c=>d+=c);process.stdin.on('end',()=>{try{const i=JSON.parse(d);const f=i.tool_input?.file_path||'';if(/\.(ts|tsx|js|jsx)$/.test(f)&&require('fs').existsSync(f)){const c=require('fs').readFileSync(f,'utf8');const m=c.match(/console\.(log|debug)\(/g)||[];if(m.length>0)console.error('[Hook] '+m.length+' console.log/debug in '+require('path').basename(f)+' — remove before committing')}}catch{}console.log(d)})"

PostToolUse.description: Warn about console.log/debug in JS/TS files after edits

hooks.command: echo '\n📋 Agent Team Status — run /agent-team status to see all tracks'
